title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Loki, Unknown person #12, Usopp, King Harald as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: KURURURURURUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU.!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So you've eaten it... lol...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now show it to me-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The legendary power)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As expected...

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki, within you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The blood of a "conquer" flows...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, if you've come back to your senses then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: its just for a moment... Cough... don't be deceived...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look around you. This is too extreme

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: for me to be forgiven...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You were just being controlled!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not quite... it's more like my very thoughts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: started to fall under that thing's influence...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i was beginning to think myself as a god.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But you...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You could lead Elbaf with honor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: together with your elder brother in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Make sure to get along well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You!! You're the worst, you know that?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: MAKING YOUR OWN SON END YOUR LIFE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not even the scummiest parent would ever make their child do something like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH by the way, I forgot to mention one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you for that incident about IDA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How did you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Burning down the Brewer's village won't bring IDA back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But I truly appreciate your feelings.

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
